rationale: Educ. Code §29.047 governs agency-approved providers and vendors of supplemental services. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The agency shall establish criteria necessary for agency approval for each category of provider of a professional service that is a supplemental service, as identified by the agency.
_note: No conflict. The rule_text concerns education service provider/vendor approval criteria and is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
